evidence: Named authority, privacy reviewer, data reviewer, technical custodian, and safety reviewer are present or have delegated authority
drill: Meeting cannot proceed without required roles

evidence: Purpose, participant group, exclusions, duration, data classes, and official Toastmasters boundary are restated
noGo: Pilot scope expands during the meeting

evidence: Developer can maintain package and tooling but cannot substitute for First Nations authority
noGo: Repository maintainer is treated as authority

evidence: Required IDS controls have pass, hold, owner, and evidence status
drill: Hold items have owner and no activation exposure
noGo: Data controls are assumed complete without evidence

evidence: PIA checks, notice version, consent wording, withdrawal/correction, and retention rules are current
noGo: Real intake opens on draft or stale wording

evidence: No-private-access roles cannot see private records; admin/reviewer access is named and expiring
noGo: Shared login or broad provider access exists

evidence: MFA, backup/export/delete, log access, and recovery owner are checked
noGo: Static demo or public repo becomes system of record

step: Run breach and cultural safety tabletop
evidence: Pause, containment, participant support, authority escalation, and notification assessment are rehearsed
drill: Scenario outcome recorded without private details
noGo: No one can pause after an incident

evidence: Charter forms, payments, member numbers, signatures, and official records remain outside this package
noGo: Official records enter public or pilot workspace

evidence: Screenshots, CSVs, JSON, docs, and public update text contain fake/sample data only
noGo: Public evidence identifies real people or context

evidence: Withdrawal, correction, access support, and incident support have owner and response time
drill: Support clock approved or hold recorded
noGo: Participants cannot get help or withdraw safely

evidence: Formal advice route is known for high-risk uncertainty, breach questions, or official record handling
Decision, conditions, holds, expiry, next review date, and no-go triggers are captured
drill: Public status only; private evidence stays private

evidence: Post-activation checks, support route, incident watch, access review, and closeout trigger are scheduled
noGo: Activation opens with no early review
